examples.en: The cow is on the farm.
The fish is in the water.
The goat is on the hill.
The dog has a long tail.
The boat is on the water.
The book is on the desk.
The girl has a red dress.
The zebra is black and white.
There are seven days in a week.
I wear boots when it rains.
The plane is in the sky.
The book is on the table.
I can see cows on the farm.
I found a shell on the beach.
examples.zh: 我在海滩上找到一个贝壳。

examples.en: I can see myself in the mirror.
examples.zh: 我能在镜子里看到自己。

examples.en: Take a photo with the camera.
I have a bottle of water.
The fruit is in the basket.
There are many trees in the forest.
The crocodile is in the river.
The squirrel is in the tree.
I can see a jellyfish in the sea.
I have a sandwich for lunch.
I read books in the library.
The books are in the bookcase.
Wash your hands in the bathroom.
The doctor is in the hospital.
